title: Sollividu Sollividu Lyrics Kaaviya Thalaivan Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Sollividu Sollividu
Singer: Mukesh
Music: A.R.Rahman
Lyricist: Pa.Vijay
Movie: Kaaviya Thalaivan

Sollividu Sollividu Sollividu
Irudhi Theerpai Nee Sollividu
Nindru Vidu Nindru Vidu Nindru Vidu
Ipporil Ivvidam Nindruvidu

Sendruvidu Sendruvidu Sendruvidu
Intha Yutham Podhum Sendru Vidu
Innum Uyirgal Vendum Endraal Ennai
Mudhalil Neeye Kondruvidu.

Kannaa Ennai Mudhalil Kondruvidu
Aaen Ambai Aendhavaithaai
Aaen Kuruthiyil Neendha Veithaai
Aaen Ulagathai Jeyikavaithaai
Aaen Ullukkul Thorkkadithaai

Ullagathai Vellavaithaai
Ullukkule Thorkadithaai
Kaandeebam Ketkiren Kannaaa
Kaandeebam Ketkiren

Sollividu Sollividu Sollividu
Irudhi Theerpai Nee Sollividu
Nindru Vidu Nindru Vidu Nindru Vidu
Ipporil Ivvidam Nindruvidu

Kaalachakaram Un Kaiyil
Adhil Sutriyatheno Naan
Vidhiyum Sadhiyum Un Kannil
Athil Sikkiyatheno Naan

Karnanai Kondra Paavam
Kannanukku Pogum Enraal
Kannanukke Paavam Thandha
Paavam Engu Pogumaiyo.

Sollividu Sollividu Sollividu
Irudhi Theerpai Nee Sollividu
Nindru Vidu Nindru Vidu Nindru Vidu
Ipporil Ivvidam Nindruvidu

Ulagame Yutham Èdharku
Oh Uyirgale Ratham Èdharku
Oh Iraivane Thuyaram Èdharku
Oh Idhayame Vanmam Èdharku

Kannaa Therai Niruththu
Ellam Veezhthi Evarudan Vaazha
Therai Niruththu.

Podhum Intha Kurudhi Kuliyal
Porai Niruththu
Naalai Ulagam Nalam Perum Endru
Porai Niruththu..
Poraai Niruththu..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Sollividu Sollividu?

The song conveys themes of longing and emotional connection, reflecting the struggles of love and separation.

How does Sollividu Sollividu fit into the plot of Kaaviya Thalaivan?

This song is pivotal in expressing the protagonist's emotional turmoil and desire, enhancing the narrative of the film.

Who is the singer and music director of Sollividu Sollividu?

The song is sung by Mukesh and composed by the renowned AR Rahman.

When was Sollividu Sollividu released?

The song was released on August 20, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Sollividu Sollividu, the protagonist expresses deep feelings of love and longing, encapsulating the emotional essence of the film Kaaviya Thalaivan. The soothing melody, crafted by AR Rahman, complements Mukesh's heartfelt rendition, making it a memorable piece. The lyrics, penned by Pa Vijay, delve into the complexities of love and separation. This song evokes a sense of nostalgia and melancholy, resonating with anyone who has faced similar emotions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sollividu Sollividu is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of longing and love. With Mukesh's soulful voice and AR Rahman's enchanting composition, this song stands out as a highlight in the film Kaaviya Thalaivan. Dive into the emotional depths of this track that resonates with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet nature of love.
stanzaMeanings: Speak up, speak up, speak up. You should speak up to resolve this issue. Stand firm, stand firm, stand firm. Right now, stand firm here.
Go ahead, go ahead, go ahead. This war is enough, go ahead. If more lives are needed, then you should take me first.
Oh my eyes, you have taken me first. Why have you made me suffer? Why have you made me sleep in pain? Why have you conquered the world? Why have you troubled me inside?
You have conquered the world. You have troubled me inside. I am listening to the call, oh my eyes. I am listening to the call.
Time is in your hands. Is it spinning? I am destiny and success in your eyes. Is it stuck there?
If the one who took Karna is going away, then what happens to the one who gave him away? Where does the pain go?
The world is a war, for what? Oh lives, for what? Oh God, for what? Oh heart, for what?
Oh my eyes, stop the light. Let everything fall. Stop the light for whoever is living.
Enough of this blindness, stop the flow of pain. Tomorrow, let the world be well. Stop the pain.
